_comment: Template for agents-auth.json (v2 bcrypt format). Do NOT use these hashes in production — run setup-memos-agents.py to generate real keys.

_format_notes.key_hash: bcrypt hash of the raw key, generated by setup-memos-agents.py
_format_notes.key_prefix: First 10 chars of the raw key, for log identification only
_format_notes.user_id: Agent identity — must match the user_id in MemOS cube ACL
_format_notes.description: Human-readable label shown in admin tools

agents.description: CEO Agent — Claude Opus 4.6 via Paperclip
